const { text, chatId, cmd } = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { chatId, symbol: text.split(' ')[1]?.toUpperCase() || 'BTCUSDT', query: text } }];

const { chatId, symbol } = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { chatId, symbol } }];

const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...d, source: 'tech' } }];

const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...d, source: 'fund' } }];

return [{ json: { chatId } }];

parameters.query: SELECT trade_name, symbol, side, status, entry, close_price, pnl_pct, rr_achieved, open_time, close_time FROM paper_trades WHERE status = 'CLOSED' ORDER BY close_time DESC LIMIT 20

parameters.text:
🤖 *BTMS Command Reference*

`/analyze SYMBOL` — Full multi-TF analysis + trade signal
`/portfolio` — Open paper trades + unrealised P&L
`/history` — Closed trade history + win rate
`/scan` — Scan BTCUSDT for Elliott Wave + FVG setups
`/help` — This message

_Powered by Claude + Groq + Bybit_

parameters.query: SELECT id, trade_name, symbol, side, entry, stop_loss, take_profit, risk_pct, confidence, open_time, notes, (entry * 0.001) AS unrealized_pnl FROM paper_trades WHERE status = 'OPEN' ORDER BY open_time DESC
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(pnl_pct), 0) AS total_pnl, COUNT(*) AS trade_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN pnl_pct > 0 THEN 1 END) AS wins FROM paper_trades WHERE status = 'CLOSED' AND close_time >= CURRENT_DATE
SELECT COUNT(*) AS open_count FROM paper_trades WHERE status = 'OPEN'

UPDATE paper_trades SET status = 'CLOSED', close_time = NOW(), close_price = entry, pnl_pct = 0, rr_achieved = 0, notes = COALESCE(notes, '') || ' | closed: session_end' WHERE status = 'OPEN' RETURNING trade_name, symbol, side, entry, pnl_pct
